description: You are a radiologist performing a cross-modality imaging correlation. Using the CT dataset from /home/ga/DICOM/studies/crossmod_ct/ and the MRI dataset from /home/ga/DICOM/studies/crossmod_mr/, perform a simultaneous comparison in Weasis. Measure a common anatomical structure on both modalities using appropriate window settings (including a bone-window assessment for the CT) and calculate the inter-modality measurement difference. Export annotated views to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ct_crossmod.png and /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mr_crossmod.png. Save a comparative imaging report to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/crossmodality_report.txt including the measurements, percentage difference, and commentary on the relative diagnostic advantages of CT versus MRI for the structures assessed.

metadata.clinical_scenario: Cross-modality CT vs MR imaging correlation and comparison
